name: real-estate-framework
description: Korean real estate decision meta-router — 9 frameworks (Hedonic Pricing, DiPasquale-Wheaton, Alonso-Muth-Mills, Cap Rate/DCF, Harrison 18.6-year cycle, Highest & Best Use, Redevelopment Feasibility, Korean Subscription Points, Gap Investment). Built on Korean real estate regime (jeonse, HUG insurance, redevelopment). NOT real estate advice. Invoke /realty.
